product_results.title: CLOSEMATE Mens Athletic Cushioned Crew Socks 6 Pairs Cotton Breathable for Work Training Sports

summary.text: Customers find these socks comfortable and appreciate the feel they provide. The socks offer a good fit, though some mention they can be tight on the feet. Users describe them as great quality socks that represent good value for money, particularly as thicker work socks. The socks also provide satisfactory warmth. However, customers have mixed opinions regarding the thickness, material, and healing properties of the socks.

authors_reviews.title: Great quality
authors_reviews.text: Great fit and feel. Colour fast and limited fading. Buy new each year and donate the old ones, which are still in great shape, to Homeless shelters.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Good quality but…
authors_reviews.text: These socks are good quality but I would have preferred if they were a bit longer in length (leg wise). I wear 9.5 shoe size so I ordered the ones that fit 6-10 feet. My foot fits well but I have big calves so the sock just stops in the middle of my calf which after a while, they droop down. I wonder if I purchased the longer ones (10-13), it would have a better fit for me… who knows. Anyways, just keep this in mind when you order.
authors_reviews.author: Carlo

authors_reviews.title: GOOD SOCKS, DECENT PRICE
authors_reviews.text: Good socks for a decent price. Recommend & would buy again.
authors_reviews.author: Craft Gal

authors_reviews.title: Sock Bankruptcy
authors_reviews.text: I have declared sock bankruptcy on several occasions over the past decade. Sock bankruptcy - for the layman - is a ditching of all previous socks at the same time in favour of ordering the exact same socks, multiple times, to fulfill your sock needs at once for, a hopefully, very long time. According to theory, because you have exactly the same socks, will never have a missing sock since all of them match. These are special socks for they must be used for every purpose: weddings, funerals, athletics, or strolling the beach with your crocs and socks.Many socks have been challenged. My black WigWam socks with their grey toes remain the standard-bearer, having lasted for four years of never-worrying, sock wearing bliss. The reorder many years later was less successful. There were Gold Toes which lasted for three years, before they were replaced by some very expensive Darn Toughs (darn ripoffs) which lasted a few months - despite being hand-washed.One pair of WigWams remains, granted a god-like, undying status, for their continual service in the afterlife of my universe of socks.For this group of Closemates, I will say they seem sturdy. A few months ago, I bought one pack, which endured being worn and washed a few times with no noticeable depreciation in quality. They were warm and comfortable. Over the last month, I have bought another 30 pair, in the hope that they will represent two generations before sock bankruptcy must be declared again. With good fortune, I shall perish from this earth before my socks.
authors_reviews.author: Alex S.

authors_reviews.title: You can throw away your Costco socks
authors_reviews.text: After wearing Costco socks size 7-11 for my size 8 feet, i had enough. but too lazy to go to mall or other store. This is it. Size 7-9 is perfect fit for size 8. very comfy as well. I'm planning to get rid of all my Costco socks (Champion?), which are loose and uncomfortable compared to to Closemate.
authors_reviews.author: Jack

authors_reviews.title: HOW LONG DO YOU EXPECT THIS TO LAST?
authors_reviews.text: OK, purchased Nov 2022 and now in Nov 2025. Starting to wear thin and now has holes in them! NOT A SOCK EXPERT HERE but less than 3 years and will need to buy new socks which are not the cheapest.....hmmmmmm!
authors_reviews.author: Chris
